title: Bittensor - Rekt
relevance_summary: PyPi package manager compromise leading to wallet theft

prevention.rule: Block any tx that involves downloading and using a PyPi package from an untrusted source.
prevention.trigger: DOWNLOAD_PACKAGE -> PyPi package download from untrusted source

monitoring_rules: BLOCK DOWNLOAD_PACKAGE -> PyPi package download from untrusted source
summary: A $8 million hack on Bittensor occurred due to a compromised PyPi package manager, which led to the theft of TAO tokens. A guard could have prevented this by blocking any transactions involving the download and use of untrusted PyPi packages.
